FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Continued To Jul-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Ottonello for Victoria Bautista.

Mr. Ottonello stated that he had received a stack of statements with no supporting material, that there was only $50,000.00 in the trust left, and that he had advised the Trustee to contact a paralegal. The matter was continued to July 20, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy S. McDaniels.
